did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a critical analysis and review of existing computer-aided approaches for skin cancer screening. It discusses and analyzes various AI methods (such as Deep Learning, CNNs, KNN, and Transfer Learning) used in other studies for tasks like classification and segmentation, but it does not perform its own experiments or use AI to obtain new primary results. It is a survey paper.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
